title: Backend Field
description: The bidirectional registry record. One row per backend field. Names the field · its type · its enum values (if any) · its scoring hook (if any) · the vocabulary term slug it back-references. Enforces the bidirectional rule from docs/doctrine/00_defendable_language_map.md.

scoring_hook.description: Named hook this field feeds · e.g., validator_confidence_weight · probability_of_close_driver

vocabulary_term_slug.description: Slug of the vocabulary term this field implements · MUST exist in docs/vocabulary/

schema_file.description: Path to the schema file that owns this field (e.g., docs/schemas/engagement.schema.json)
